revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''上根二子塚古墳群'''（かみねふたごづかこふんぐん）は、[[栃木県]][[芳賀郡]][[市貝町]]にある、[[古墳時代]]前期後半...'
revision.text:
'''上根二子塚古墳群'''（かみねふたごづかこふんぐん）は、[[栃木県]][[芳賀郡]][[市貝町]]にある、[[古墳時代]]前期後半のものと推定される[[前方後方墳]]2基と[[方墳]]（推定）2基から成る古墳群。 == 概要 == 市貝町を南北に流れる大川の左岸、丘陵上の上根地区に前方後方墳2基と方墳と思われる墳丘が2基の4基から成る古墳群がある。1号墳から4号墳に分けられ、1号墳と3号墳が前方後方墳、2号墳と4号墳が方墳とされる。 === 1号墳 === '''上根二子塚1号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、緩い斜面上に前方部を西に向けて築かれた前方後方墳。4世紀末ごろの築造と推定される。全長29ｍ。後方部の長さ15ｍ、幅16ｍ、高さ2ｍ。前方部は長さ14ｍ、端部幅8ｍ、高さ1ｍ。 === 3号墳 === '''上根二子塚3号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、尾根上の地形を生かして築かれた前方後方墳で、ほぼ南を向いている。こちらも4世紀後半ごろに1号墳に次いで築造されたものと推定される。全長42.7ｍ。後方部の長さ26ｍ、幅24ｍ、高さ3.8ｍ。前方部は長さ16.7ｍ、端部幅19.4ｍ、高さ1.6ｍ。 === 2号墳・4号墳 === 2号墳と4号墳は詳しい測量が行なわれておらず、どのような形状なのかは不明である。おそらくは方墳ではないかとされているが、[[円墳]]の可能性もある。 == 発掘・調査 == 全ての墳丘に対して詳しい調査は行なわれておらず、埋葬施設がどのようになっているかは不明。周溝から土器などが発見されている。 == 主な出土品 == * 甕形土器 ** 器内に多量の[[ベンガラ]]（赤色顔料）が含まれていた。 == 所在地 == 〒321-3424
栃木県芳賀郡市貝町上根
〒321-3423
栃木県芳賀郡市貝町市塙4472
「ヒルタウンあずみ野」西方丘陵上 == 交通・アクセス == * [[真岡鐵道]][[真岡線]][[市塙駅]]から徒歩約45分。[[タクシー]]で約10分。 * [[JRバス関東]]「市貝温泉入口」バス停より徒歩約30分。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[関東の史跡一覧]] ==出典・参考文献== * 探訪とちぎの古墳（[[塙静夫]]:著）[[随想舎]] ISBN 4-88748-034-2 * 市貝町史 ==外部リンク== * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php 真岡鐵道HP] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ 市貝町役場] {{DEFAULTSORT:かみねふたこつかこふん}} [[Category:栃木県の古墳]]

'''上根二子塚古墳群'''（かみねふたごづかこふんぐん）は、[[栃木県]][[芳賀郡]][[市貝町]]にある、[[古墳時代]]前期後半のものと推定される[[前方後方墳]]2基と[[方墳]]（推定）2基から成る古墳群。 == 概要 == 市貝町を南北に流れる大川の左岸、丘陵上の上根地区に前方後方墳2基と方墳と思われる墳丘が2基の4基から成る古墳群がある。1号墳から4号墳に分けられ、1号墳と3号墳が前方後方墳、2号墳と4号墳が方墳とされる。 === 1号墳 === '''上根二子塚1号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、緩い斜面上に前方部を西に向けて築かれた前方後方墳。4世紀末ごろの築造と推定される。全長29ｍ。後方部の長さ15ｍ、幅16ｍ、高さ2ｍ。前方部は長さ14ｍ、端部幅8ｍ、高さ1ｍ。 === 3号墳 === '''上根二子塚3号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、尾根上の地形を生かして築かれた前方後方墳で、ほぼ南を向いている。こちらも4世紀後半ごろに1号墳に次いで築造されたものと推定される。全長42.7ｍ。後方部の長さ26ｍ、幅24ｍ、高さ3.8ｍ。前方部は長さ16.7ｍ、端部幅19.4ｍ、高さ1.6ｍ。 === 2号墳・4号墳 === 2号墳と4号墳は詳しい測量が行なわれておらず、どのような形状なのかは不明である。おそらくは方墳ではないかとされているが、[[円墳]]の可能性もある。 == 発掘・調査 == 全ての墳丘に対して詳しい調査は行なわれておらず、埋葬施設がどのようになっているかは不明。周溝から土器などが発見されている。 == 主な出土品 == * 甕形土器 ** 器内に多量の[[弁柄|ベンガラ]]（[[赤|赤色]][[顔料]]）が含まれていた。 == 所在地 == 〒321-3424

'''上根二子塚古墳群'''（かみねふたごづかこふんぐん）は、[[栃木県]][[芳賀郡]][[市貝町]]にある、[[古墳時代]]前期後半のものと推定される[[前方後方墳]]2基と[[方墳]]（推定）2基から成る古墳群。 == 概要 == 市貝町を南北に流れる大川の左岸、丘陵上の上根地区に前方後方墳2基と方墳と思われる墳丘が2基の4基から成る古墳群がある。1号墳から4号墳に分けられ、1号墳と3号墳が前方後方墳、2号墳と4号墳が方墳とされる。 === 1号墳 === '''上根二子塚1号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、緩い斜面上に前方部を西に向けて築かれた前方後方墳。4世紀末ごろの築造と推定される。全長29m。後方部の長さ15m、幅16m、高さ2m。前方部は長さ14m、端部幅8m、高さ1m。 === 3号墳 === '''上根二子塚3号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、尾根上の地形を生かして築かれた前方後方墳で、ほぼ南を向いている。こちらも4世紀後半ごろに1号墳に次いで築造されたものと推定される。全長42.7m。後方部の長さ26m、幅24m、高さ3.8m。前方部は長さ16.7m、端部幅19.4m、高さ1.6m。 === 2号墳・4号墳 === 2号墳と4号墳は詳しい測量が行なわれておらず、どのような形状なのかは不明である。おそらくは方墳ではないかとされているが、[[円墳]]の可能性もある。 == 発掘・調査 == 全ての墳丘に対して詳しい調査は行なわれておらず、埋葬施設がどのようになっているかは不明。周溝から土器などが発見されている。 == 主な出土品 == * 甕形土器 ** 器内に多量の[[弁柄|ベンガラ]]（[[赤|赤色]][[顔料]]）が含まれていた。 == 所在地 == 〒321-3424

栃木県芳賀郡市貝町市塙4472 「ヒルタウンあすみ野」西方丘陵上 == 交通・アクセス == * [[真岡鐵道]][[真岡鐵道真岡線|真岡線]][[市塙駅]]から徒歩約45分。[[タクシー]]で約10分。 * [[ジェイアールバス関東|JRバス関東]]「市貝温泉入口」バス停より徒歩約30分。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[関東の史跡一覧]] == 出典・参考文献 == * 探訪とちぎの古墳（[[塙静夫]]:著）[[随想舎]] ISBN 4-88748-034-2 * 市貝町史 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php 真岡鐵道HP] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ 市貝町役場] {{DEFAULTSORT:かみねふたこつかこふん}} [[Category:栃木県の古墳]] [[Category:古墳群]] [[Category:市貝町]]

'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a burial mound group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳}} (rectangular front and rear burial mounds) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a burial mound group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The burial mound known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The burial mound known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the burial mounds, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}
[[Category:Kofun in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:History of Ichikai, Tochigi]] [[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]]

[[Category:Kofun in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:History of Ichikai, Tochigi]] [[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] [[Category:Pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:前方後方墳]][[sn:Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group]][[Category:前方後方墳]] [[Category:方墳]][[sn:Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group]][[Category:方墳]]

'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a burial mound group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun}} (rectangular front and rear burial mounds) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a burial mound group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The burial mound known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The burial mound known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the burial mounds, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}

'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}

It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop. == See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

revision.text:
'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄|12=draft|12=draft}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=draft|12=draft}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅|12=draft|12=draft}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=draft|12=draft}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=draft|12=draft}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=draft|12=draft}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=draft|12=draft}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}} {{citation needed|Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:History of Ichikai, Tochigi]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] [[sn:Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group]] [[sn:amine Futagozuka Kofun Group]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group}}

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:上根二子塚古墳群 up to rev 94730098
revision.text:
'''上根二子塚古墳群'''（かみねふたごづかこふんぐん）は、[[栃木県]][[芳賀郡]][[市貝町]]にある、[[古墳時代]]前期後半のものと推定される[[前方後方墳]]2基と[[方墳]]（推定）2基から成る古墳群。 == 概要 == 市貝町を南北に流れる大川の左岸、丘陵上の上根地区に前方後方墳2基と方墳と思われる墳丘が2基の4基から成る古墳群がある。1号墳から4号墳に分けられ、1号墳と3号墳が前方後方墳、2号墳と4号墳が方墳とされる。 === 1号墳 === '''上根二子塚1号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、緩い斜面上に前方部を西に向けて築かれた前方後方墳。4世紀末ごろの築造と推定される。全長29m。後方部の長さ15m、幅16m、高さ2m。前方部は長さ14m、端部幅8m、高さ1m。 === 3号墳 === '''上根二子塚3号墳'''と呼ばれる墳丘は、尾根上の地形を生かして築かれた前方後方墳で、ほぼ南を向いている。こちらも4世紀後半ごろに1号墳に次いで築造されたものと推定される。全長42.7m。後方部の長さ26m、幅24m、高さ3.8m。前方部は長さ16.7m、端部幅19.4m、高さ1.6m。 === 2号墳・4号墳 === 2号墳と4号墳は詳しい測量が行なわれておらず、どのような形状なのかは不明である。おそらくは方墳ではないかとされているが、[[円墳]]の可能性もある。 == 発掘・調査 == 全ての墳丘に対して詳しい調査は行なわれておらず、埋葬施設がどのようになっているかは不明。周溝から土器などが発見されている。 == 主な出土品 == * 甕形土器 ** 器内に多量の[[弁柄|ベンガラ]]（[[赤|赤色]][[顔料]]）が含まれていた。 == 所在地 == 〒321-3424
栃木県芳賀郡市貝町上根 〒321-3423
栃木県芳賀郡市貝町市塙4472 「ヒルタウンあすみ野」西方丘陵上 == 交通・アクセス == * [[真岡鐵道]][[真岡鐵道真岡線|真岡線]][[市塙駅]]から徒歩約45分。[[タクシー]]で約10分。 * [[ジェイアールバス関東|JRバス関東]]「市貝温泉入口」バス停より徒歩約30分。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[関東地方の史跡一覧]] == 出典・参考文献 == * 探訪とちぎの古墳（[[塙静夫]]:著）[[随想舎]] ISBN 4-88748-034-2 * 市貝町史 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php 真岡鐵道HP] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ 市貝町役場] {{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみねふたこつかこふん}} [[Category:栃木県の古墳]] [[Category:古墳群]] [[Category:市貝町の歴史]]

栃木県芳賀郡市貝町上根 〒321-3423
栃木県芳賀郡市貝町市塙4472 「ヒルタウンあすみ野」西方丘陵上 == 交通・アクセス == * [[真岡鐵道]][[真岡鐵道真岡線|真岡線]][[市塙駅]]から徒歩約45分。[[タクシー]]で約10分。 * [[ジェイアールバス関東|JRバス関東]]「市貝温泉入口」バス停より徒歩約30分。 == 関連項目 == * [[日本の古墳一覧]] * [[関東地方の史跡一覧]] == 出典・参考文献 == * 探訪とちぎの古墳（[[塙静夫]]:著）[[随想舎]] ISBN 4-88748-034-2 * 市貝町史 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php 真岡鐵道HP] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ 市貝町役場] {{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみねふたこつかこふん}} [[Category:栃木県の古墳]] [[Category:古墳群]] [[Category:市貝町の歴史]]

'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}} {{citation needed|Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group}} {{draft categories|
}}

'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|ja|市貝町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|ja|芳賀郡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengara|ja|弁柄|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|ja|真岡鐵道真岡線|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|ja|市塙駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}
{{translated page|ja|上根二子塚古墳群|version=94730098|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: add category Category:市貝町の歴史
revision.text:
'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|qq=}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|qq=}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|qq=}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|qq=}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|qq=}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|qq=}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|qq=}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|qq=}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|qq=}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|qq=}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}
{{translated page|ja|上根二子塚古墳群|version=94730098|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 1]] }}

== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|qq=|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|qq=|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|qq=|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|qq=|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|qq=|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|qq=|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|qq=|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|qq=|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|qq=|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|qq=|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|qq=|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}
{{translated page|ja|上根二子塚古墳群|version=94730098|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]
{{Coord|36|32|43.0|N|140|05|07.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-09|display=title}}
{{translated page|ja|上根二子塚古墳群|version=94730098|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q11359424}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:History of Ichikai Town]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Tochigi prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in [[:en:Ichikai, Tochigi|Ichikai, Tochigi]], [[:en:Haga District, Tochigi|Haga District, Tochigi]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]].
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * [[:en:Mooka Line|Mooka Line]], {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from [[:en:Ichihana Station|Ichihana Station]], or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11359424]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|en|Ichikai, Tochigi|WD=Q577654|lt=Ichikai, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|en|Haga District, Tochigi|WD=Q1192087|lt=Haga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|WD=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|en|Mooka Line|WD=Q11583119|lt=Mooka Line}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|en|Ichihana Station|WD=Q5986130|lt=Ichihana Station}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=List of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
== External Links == * [http://www.city.moka.tochigi.jp/mokasl/index.php Mooka Railway Official Website] * [http://www.town.ichikai.tochigi.jp/ Ichikai Town Office]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|en|Ichikai, Tochigi|WD=Q577654|lt=Ichikai, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|en|Haga District, Tochigi|WD=Q1192087|lt=Haga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|WD=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."

〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|en|Mooka Line|WD=Q11583119|lt=Mooka Line|1=Mooka Line}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|en|Ichihana Station|WD=Q5986130|lt=Ichihana Station|1=Ichihana Station}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto Company|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=list of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
