<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:上根二子塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.54527777777778|N|140.08527777777778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
'''Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (上根二子塚古墳群) is a Kofun group located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|en|Ichikai, Tochigi|qid=Q577654|lt=Ichikai, Tochigi|1=Ichikai, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|en|Haga District, Tochigi|qid=Q1192087|lt=Haga District, Tochigi|1=Haga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It consists of two {{ill|Zenpokoho-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoho-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (rectangular front and rear Kofuns) and two presumed {{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square mounds) that are estimated to date from the latter half of the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}.
== Overview == On the left bank of the Ōkawa River, which flows north to south through Ichikai, there is a Kofun group on the hills of the Kamine area, consisting of four mounds: two Zenpokoho-fun (mounds 1 and 3) and two presumed Hōfun (mounds 2 and 4).
=== Mound 1 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 1''' is a Zenpokoho-fun built on a gentle slope with its front part facing west. It is estimated to have been constructed around the late 4th century. * Total length: 29m * Rear mound: Length 15m, width 16m, height 2m * Front mound: Length 14m, width at end 8m, height 1m
=== Mound 3 === The Kofun known as '''Kamine Futagozuka Mound 3''' is a Zenpokoho-fun constructed using the natural topography of a ridge, with its front part facing almost directly south. It is estimated to have been built shortly after Mound 1 in the late 4th century. * Total length: 42.7m * Rear mound: Length 26m, width 24m, height 3.8m * Front mound: Length 16.7m, width at end 19.4m, height 1.6m
=== Mound 2 & Mound 4 === Mounds 2 and 4 have not been extensively surveyed, and their precise shapes remain unknown. They are believed to be Hōfun, though the possibility of them being {{ill|Enpun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (circular mounds) has not been ruled out.
== Excavation & Survey == No detailed surveys have been conducted on any of the Kofuns, and the structure of their burial facilities remains unknown. However, pottery and other artifacts have been discovered in the surrounding ditches.
== Major Discoveries == * Jar-shaped pottery ** Contained large amounts of {{ill|Bengala|ja|弁柄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bengara|qq=}} (red pigment).
== Location == 〒321-3424 Kamine, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan
〒321-3423 Ichihana 4472, Ichikai, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture, Japan Located on the western hills of "Hilltown Asumino."
== Transportation & Access == * {{ill|Mooka Line|en|Mooka Line|qid=Q11583119|lt=Mooka Line|1=Mooka Line}}, {{ill|Mooka Railway|ja|真岡鐵道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mooka Railway|1=Mōka Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11240879}} – 45-minute walk from {{ill|Ichihana Station|en|Ichihana Station|qid=Q5986130|lt=Ichihana Station|1=Ichihana Station}}, or about 10 minutes by taxi. * {{ill|JR Bus Kanto|ja|ジェイアールバス関東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Bus Kanto|1=JR Bus Kanto Company|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10851155}} – 30-minute walk from the "Ichikai Onsen Iriguchi" bus stop.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}} * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|ja|関東地方の史跡一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Kantō)|1=list of historical sites in the Kanto region|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11655845}}
== References & Literature == * *Exploring Tochigi’s Kofun* (*探訪とちぎの古墳*), by {{ill|Shizuo Hanawa|ja|塙静夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shizuo Hanawa|1=Shizuo Hanawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30930837}}, published by {{ill|Zuisōsha|ja|随想舎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuisōsha|1=Zuisosha publishing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11658944}}, ISBN 4-88748-034-2. * *Ichikai Town History* (*市貝町史*).
